'''tapazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemmi|zemmi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemmi|zemmi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tapazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpæzhæth|tæpæzhæth]] || [[word:tæpæzhæj|tæpæzhæj]] || [[word:tæpæzhæsh|tæpæzhæsh]] || [[word:tæpæzhæ|tæpæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapapazhath|tapapazhath]] || [[word:tapapazhaj|tapapazhaj]] || [[word:tapapazhash|tapapazhash]] || [[word:tapapazha|tapapazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapazhath|tapazhath]] || [[word:tapazhaj|tapazhaj]] || [[word:tapazhash|tapazhash]] || [[word:tapazha|tapazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapafzhath|tapafzhath]] || [[word:tapafzhaj|tapafzhaj]] || [[word:tapafzhash|tapafzhash]] || [[word:tapafzhaf|tapafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapazhatha|tapazhatha]] || [[word:tapazhaja|tapazhaja]] || [[word:tapazhasha|tapazhasha]] || [[word:tapazhaka|tapazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapazhath|tapazhath]] || [[word:tapazhaj|tapazhaj]] || [[word:tapazhash|tapazhash]] || [[word:tapazha|tapazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapazhathal|tapazhathal]] || [[word:tapazhajal|tapazhajal]] || [[word:tapazhashal|tapazhashal]] || [[word:tapazhakal|tapazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapazhathatha|tapazhathatha]] || [[word:tapazhajaja|tapazhajaja]] || [[word:tapazhashasha|tapazhashasha]] || [[word:tapazhaka|tapazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapazhathan|tapazhathan]] || [[word:tapazhajan|tapazhajan]] || [[word:tapazhashan|tapazhashan]] || [[word:tapazhakan|tapazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapazhathaoro|tapazhathaoro]] || [[word:tapazhajaoro|tapazhajaoro]] || [[word:tapazhashaoro|tapazhashaoro]] || [[word:tapazhakaoro|tapazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
